what_it_does: Records an image attachment for the design-assets channel, linking to a specific screenshot file in the infographs folder.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
Channel is design-assets and attachment_type is images.
There are no code symbols present.
standouts: The attachment target is a dated screenshot filename in the infographs folder.
The file is a minimal metadata-only ledger entry.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Attachment id uses an att- prefix.
Target uses an image:// URI scheme.
concerns: The target filename contains spaces and an auto-generated timestamp, making it non-descriptive and potentially brittle.
There is no caption, alt text, uploader, or file hash.
No indication whether the referenced image still exists or is reachable.
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that points to a screenshot in the design-assets channel's infographs folder.
questions: Who uploaded the attachment and in what context?
Is the referenced image file still present at that path?
Is there a caption or associated message for this attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches content: it is a metadata record linking to an image attachment.
intention_signals: To track an uploaded screenshot image in the design-assets channel so it can be referenced and retrieved later.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped reference to a specific image file in the design-assets channel, supporting retrieval and association of the screenshot with channel memory.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-a8f0bfef in the design-assets channel linking to the image file 'Screenshot 2026-05-19 145956' under infographs, added on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an uploaded screenshot image so it can be located and referenced within the design-assets channel memory.
